text:
EXAMPLE 9: 

A patient with advanced multiple sclerosis undergoing an exacerbation of the illness 
needs skilled teaching of medications, measures to overcome urinary retention, and the 
establishment of a program designed to minimize the adverse impact of the exacerbation. 
The clinical notes for each home health visit must describe why skilled nursing services 
were required. The skilled nursing care received by the patient would be covered despite 
the chronic nature of the illness.
